steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $x/5 + y/7 - 70 = 0 → y=-7x/5 + 490$. So the slope of the given line is $-7/5$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $5/7$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
